message:
test(bd-33a2): cover stats Debug/Clone, CAS loop, and list detection

Add 5 tests to fastmcp-console stats module exercising ServerStats
Debug/Clone derives, StatsSnapshot Debug/Clone, list_operations
contains-based detection for non-prefix methods, and concurrent
connection_closed CAS retry loop (6 → 11 tests).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
